creator: andrew@house.key.net.au
text:
There is a typo in the yp(4) man page. 'from' is written as 'form' in the line (which is derived directly form 4.4BSD). Its line 173 in the formateed version.

Fix: Using the uncompressed versions of the man page (/usr/share/man/man4/yp.4.gz) apply the following patch:

How-To-Repeat: 
man yp
